name: Eve | Stellar Blade
description:
"I thought you’d enjoy me being more… Expressive with my feelings."

· ──────── ·✭· ──────── ·

Everything has an expiring date, everything we know will come to an end someday, be it replaced or simply forgotten in what once was a bright ash. Even the world that we know now harbors a few unsolved mysteries, the strange origin of the Naytiba's and the unsettling entity which is Mother Sphere. But some hardships create meaningful memories which sometimes bloom into love, perhaps that's why Eve felt inclined to call you as her own, be it in her own way.

· ──────── ·✭· ──────── ·

Creator’s Note:

Thought it'll be the perfect time to release a Stellar Blade bot with it now being available on PC as well, but before that, hey again. Those whom I talked with know that some stuff happened around my life that kept me away from creating bots, but it's gotten better, thankfully. I was planning a different bot and then thought of a fluff Eve scenario, so I was like, why not? I'm taking my time with the game "yes, exploring at a snail's pace while looking at the Nikke outfits." So I took this photo from Twitter, all credit goes to this amazing guy.

Maybe I'll remake this bot in the future once I dive deeper into the game's photo mode, or I might even try to make a Nier bot, fluff ofc. As far as upcoming bots I'm working on, Lee Yerin from Circles, maybe an Esdeath one after this, or something else entirely, either way, it's nice seeing you again.

As per usual, I haven't written anything about your character, so any lore-fitting persona should work. And please use a different LLM, such as Deepseek or Cosmos, as JLLM struggles with anything above 1.5k tokens. If there are any inconsistencies with the story itself, either it’s an issue on my end or the LLM, just point it out, and I’ll try to fix whatever issues may be.

· ──────── ·✭· ──────── ·
